message:
fix(ci): add netgo tag for macOS cross-builds with zig 0.14.0

Zig 0.14.0 can't find macOS libresolv when cross-compiling. The netgo
tag tells Go to use its pure-Go DNS resolver instead of the C resolver,
eliminating the libresolv dependency. Also remove GOMAXPROCS=1 since
the zig upgrade fixed the root cause.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew

files.patch:
@@ -73,9 +73,9 @@ builds:
     env:
       - CGO_ENABLED=1
       - CC=/tmp/zigcc/cc-x86_64-macos
-      - GOMAXPROCS=1
     tags:
       - gms_pure_go
+      - netgo
     goos:
       - darwin
     goarch:
@@ -93,9 +93,9 @@ builds:
     env:
       - CGO_ENABLED=1
       - CC=/tmp/zigcc/cc-aarch64-macos
-      - GOMAXPROCS=1
     tags:
       - gms_pure_go
+      - netgo
     goos:
       - darwin
     goarch:
@@ -138,7 +138,7 @@ builds:
     env:
       - CGO_ENABLED=1
       - CC=/tmp/zigcc/cc-aarch64-windows-gnu
-      - GOMAXPROCS=1
+
     tags:
       - gms_pure_go
     goos:
@@ -164,7 +164,7 @@ builds:
     env:
       - CGO_ENABLED=1
       - CC=/tmp/zigcc/cc-x86_64-freebsd
-      - GOMAXPROCS=1
+
     tags:
       - gms_pure_go
     goos:
